sutta:
Thus have I heard on a certain occasion the exalted one was staying near Savatthi at Jetta grove in Anathapindika spa. The exalted one addressed the monks
    "Monks, I know of no other single form by which a man's heart is so enslaved as it is by that of a woman a woman's form obsesses a man's heart.",
    "Monks, I know of no other single sound by which a man's heart is so enslaved as it is by the voice of a woman a woman's voice obsesses a man's heart.",
    "Monks, I know of no other single scent by which a man's heart is so enslaved as it is by that of a woman.",
    "Monks, I know of no other single taste by which a man's heart is so enslaved as it is by that of a woman.",
    "Monks, I know of no other single touch by which a man's heart is so enslaved as it is by that of a woman.",
    "Monks, I know of no other single form by which a woman's heart is so enslaved as it is by that of a man a man's form obsesses a woman's heart.",
    "Monks, I know of no other single sound, smell, taste, touch by which a woman's heart is so enslaved as it is by the voice of a man a man's voice obsesses a woman's heart.
